feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MDG ATC - ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT errors
entry.content:
Dear All ,


When we do ATC checks on MDG Enhancements using ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT  variant  ,we get lot of errors "Usage of not released application API " although we are using standard MDG API methods . Does any faced this problem ? Is SAP planning to release new APIs in place of existing ones to reslove these errors in future ?

Kindly share your experiences if you have come up with such problems in the past or how to resolve these errors ?

entry.title: FIORI : Is MDG/MDC required to perform Start Mass Maintenance for Business Partner in S4 Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is it possible to perform Business Partner Mass Maintenance without MDG/MDC in S4HANA Fiori.

The requirement is to perform BP Mass Maintenance in S4HANA Fiori.

I've activated below OData Services, related ICF nodes, system alias created and required roles assigned.

ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__1405
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__147
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__194
ZMDC_PROCESS_SRV__986

I'm in BP Start Mass Maintenance and getting error message as "No process template for goal Basic Mass Update and OTC 147 does exist".

Is Process Template config is must to perform BP mass maintenance?

How this can be fixed.

 

Thanks,

SureshRT

entry.title: Dismantling of custom entities
entry.content:
Dear MDG community,

In our MDG system we have two custom entities for business partners. They will not be needed in the future, so we want to remove the custom entities from the MDG customer workflow and from our data model.Is this request feasible and if so, are there any instructions?

Best regards

Isabelle Köhler

entry.title: SAP MDG integration with CDQ
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for support on how to integrate SAP MDG with CDQ (Address enrichment tool). Any guidelines or step by step process available to do the integration? 

Regards

Viral

entry.title: SAP MDG: Full Forms of column names in Mapping Sheet
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

Hope you guys are doing well 🙂

I recently downloaded the Sheet form S Note, I checked in Legend sheet but not found, some of the column names not able to guess in below screenshot (CMP, GOV & MOP).


Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer & Supplier
entry.content:
Hi SCN Folks, 

performing HANA Search for both Customer and Supplier,

Will the Customising Mode be the same on both? Why? Because initially I kept the Customising Configuration for the customer working properly, and then I went to the supplier to configure it, receiving the result that it was defaulted in the supplier but lost in the customer.

Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: Automatic replication of custom table data upon update
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement in which there is a custom table with customer/vendor as key fields and other custom fields in which this will be updated from and RFC call from external system and once data is updated in the table the specific customer/vendor data has to be replicated to target systems. 

Can you guys please help me how this can be achieved.

entry.title: Hallo, ist es technisch möglich, dass wir aus dem MDG in Ariba springen? Um hier Dokumente zu sehen
entry.content: Ist dies derzeit technisch möglich, dass wir aus dem MDG direkt in Ariba springen können um hier im SLP Dokumente zu lesen oder weiter zu senden?

entry.title: Create CR type dumps internally at CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL
entry.content:
Scenario: 'Create change Request type and activate 

Standard code dumps at select statement when joining FDT_ADMN_000 , FDT_RSTL_0000 with the version table FDT_ADMN_0030 We could not find the object id causing this dump

Dump :  Any one faced dump DBSQL_TABLE_UNKNOWN CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB in the standard class CL_FDT_SERVICES_INTERNAL GET_FUNCTIONS_FOR_RULESETS line 112, please let us know any suggestions regarding this or any latest sap note to solve this.

Environment : S4HANA

Thanks !

entry.title: SAP MDG Multiobject processing Change Request Derivation scenario
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

Setup

  • MDG 9.2
  • MM Data model
  • Custom Type 1 entity
  • For this custom entity we have created a Multi object processing type change request.

We have a requirement where we need to derive the same values across all the type 1 entities within this multi object processing change request.

I understand that we can not do this using USMD_RULE_SERVICE or USMD_RULE_SERVICE_ET since there we can only perform derivations for  type 1 entity and its type 4 entities but not across multiple type 1 entities.

I understand that there might be a possibility to achieve derivation across multiple type 1 entities using access class. Can someone please help me with an example of how to use access class to achieve such functionality.

entry.title: Error message not preventing users to submit the change request in MDG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've a new requirement to add a new field in GENERAL DATA of the change request header. And I've to make this field as mandatory based on some conditions.

Now the condition is working fine, and the error message also showing. But user can continue to submit the change request even though the error message is there. It is not stopping the user.

I've added the code for the validation in GET DATA method of the class - CL_USMD_CR_GUIBB_GENERAL_DATA (Feeder class)

Also I tried to make that as mandatory using fpmgb_s_actionusage, which is also not working as expected. in the UI it is mandatory, but it is also not preventing the user to submit the request.

 

Please correct me if I'm wrong or if any other methods to be followed. 

 

Kind Regards,

Akhil

entry.title: SAP MDG: Description not getting reflecting Change Request Tracker
entry.content:
HI SCN Folks, 

In Change Request Tracker, description not getting reflect


Like what are the ways to get fix....

 

Thanks, 

Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Service MDG_REQ_PC is missing in SICF
entry.content:
Hello SCN,

We have activated all necessary business functions however MDG_REQ_PC service is not present while search in SICF. Note : Installed product and software version shown on fiori app documentation are available in system.

Thanks,

entry.title: MRP2 view, in house production time is activated for raw material.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

For raw material, even after I've specified that: int. purchase orders are not allowed in OMS2, I still see the inhouse production time in MRP2 view. Please inform how to suppress the inhouse production time for raw material.

 

Regards

Vinay

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: Description not getting reflecting Change Re...
entry.content:
Hi SCN Folks, 

got the solution the only thing needs to give is - in initiator row, after initiator step member need to assign in Next Step Column, 

Once it get done in SAP MDG IMG, Come back to fiori CR 

 

Thank You,

Suggu Sandeep 🙂

 

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer...
entry.content: It's showing same

entry.title: Queries around Cloud ready mode in sap MDG on S4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

Our system is being upgraded to S/4 Hana 2023 on premise. We are planning to implement a Cloud Ready Mode for Business partner (Customer and Supplier). I do have a few queries about it.

 

  1. Currently we are using Ariba SLP for onboarding Suppliers. Is MDG Cloud Ready Mode supports Ariba SLP integration?
  2. How derivation and validation across entity types works in Cloud-ready mode. Do single-entity and across-entity Badis (USMD_RULE_SERVICE) are supported in Cloud-ready mode?
  3. In Automation workflow can system trigger the validation at request submission stage, or a separate step would be required in the workflow? In the current process (Rube base workflow) it does the validation at the Change Request submission stage.
  4. How can we enable a set of fields at each workflow steps (e.g. four level of approvers) in automation workflow?
  5. Can you please provide the product (Material) release date for support in Cloud Ready Mode?
  6. In product/Material Cloud Ready Mode- Is classic classification will be supported for material class (001) in classic mode?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data   @0012anirban @Mark63  @Rahul15 

 

Thanks

Rahul Khandelwal

entry.title: Mass updates of New Tax Category (condition type_
entry.content:
Dear,

We are working ON S/4 HANA conversion project. now we are doing post conversion activities on S/4 HANA.

when we synchronized customer to BP on ECC, that time TAX category (Tax condition type) was CNXJ. 

now on S/4 we have created new TAX category UTXJ, when we opened BP for existing customer in display mode we don't see this UTXJ in billing tab of sales area (FLCU01) but when we clicked on Change mode, we can see new tax category.

Is this expected behavior of system? what should be do to see see new tax category in display mode only without going to change mode.?

Thank you

entry.title: MDG Consolidation with active records
entry.content:
Hi MDG Experts,
We have created custom template for consolidation with Active records and strategy set as 'Remove duplicates'
After activation step, Best record is updated as per Best record calculation logic and other potential duplicate records are marked for deletion but, Is there any table to get those details like, which records are marked for deletion, which records were selected as selection step, which records were outcome of matching step ?

I am able to check activate record through Manage consolidation tile, but didn't more information through that tile.
As Process is successfully activated now, I am not see data of matching step.

Please guide here with tables/Function module to get those information.

Thanks,
Brijeshkumar

entry.title: Dupicated regions for Mexico
entry.content:
We are implementing SAP in a company, and in the DEV system the regions (states) for the country of Mexico are duplicated.

How can this be fixed, We have not start using it yet.

Thank you.
